title: abutilon australe var. malvifolium
intro: Abutilon australe var. malvifolium, also known as the Australian hollyhock or bush velvet plant, is a variety of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Abutilon australe var. malvifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support wound healing due to its rich content of flavonoids and saponins. Abutilon australe var. malvifolium is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction in herbal medicine, often used in traditional Chinese medicine and other folk remedies.
